title: Vanilla Creamy Spanish Chicken Stir-fry
description: A light and kid-friendly Spanish dish featuring sous-vide cooked chicken with a hint of vanilla extract for added flavor in this high-protein-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Sous-vide cooked chicken
ingredients.notes: Use the recommended portion from your sous-vide cooker instructions.

instructions: Combine vanilla extract and chicken broth in a small saucepan. Bring to a simmer over medium heat until the mixture thickens slightly, about 5 minutes.
Add rice vinegar and stir well to combine with the vanilla broth.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat. Add sliced red bell pepper and green onions; sauté for about 2 minutes.
Add minced ginger and continue cooking until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Gently fold in the sous-vide cooked chicken pieces to warm them through evenly.
Pour the vanilla broth mixture over the chicken and vegetables. Cook until the sauce thickens slightly around the edges of the wok.
Serve hot as a light dinner dish.
